description_long: This is a compact, two-seater sofa upholstered in dark brown leather with a smooth, slightly glossy finish. The backrest is high and rounded, seamlessly integrated with the armrests, which are thick and gently curved, providing a plush and inviting appearance. The seat consists of two large, flat cushions, and a single light beige throw pillow is placed on the right side, adding a touch of contrast. The sofa's base is solid and fully upholstered, with no visible legs, giving it a grounded and monolithic look. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with no visible decorative stitching or tufting, emphasizing comfort and simplicity. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A modern, dark brown leather two-seater sofa with a high rounded back, thick curved armrests, and a single beige pillow for contrast. The design is smooth, minimalistic, and fully upholstered with no visible legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high rounded backrest, two seat cushions, thick armrests, and a beige pillow on the right.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the curve of the armrest and backrest, and the placement of the beige pillow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, smoothly curved backrest and fully upholstered back with no visible seams or legs.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the solid armrest and the profile of the seat and backrest, with the beige pillow partially visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, flat seat cushions and a single continuous, attached backrest; one loose beige throw pillow on the right.
attribute_armrest_style: Thick, fully upholstered armrests with a rounded, gently curved profile, rising to the same height as the backrest and seat.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is fully upholstered and extends to the floor, giving a monolithic appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous, and rounded backrest integrated with the armrests, with no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown leather with a smooth, slightly glossy finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
